texto: Led Zeppelin created their music from a diet of Bert Jansch, Memphis Minnie, John Fahey, Billy Fury, Phil Spector, Richard 'Rabbit' Brown, Moby Grape, Manitas De Plata and Om Kalsoum. Those who came afterwards were content with a diet of Led Zeppelin, which is not the same thing at all.
explicacao: Citação de David Hepworth sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Led Zeppelin created their music from a diet of Bert Jansch, Memphis Minnie, John Fahey, Billy Fu…” articula reflexao, influence, ledzeppelin em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como ledzeppelin e music.

frase_original: Led Zeppelin created their music from a diet of Bert Jansch, Memphis Minnie, John Fahey, Billy Fury, Phil Spector, Richard 'Rabbit' Brown, Moby Grape, Manitas De Plata and Om Kalsoum. Those who came afterwards were content with a diet of Led Zeppelin, which is not the same thing at all.
